classification.reasoning: The document contains multiple fields that align with the expense schema, including supplier, transaction amount, transaction date, invoice receipt number, and item description line items. The presence of these fields confirms it as an expense document.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: The document contains 5 out of 8 required fields, confirming it as an expense document.

issues.description: Supplier address is missing on the receipt

issues.description: Additional documentation is required for the expense
issues.recommendation: Please provide the original invoice and deduction sheet to Local Employer's Dalian Branch. Use S.F. Express paid by shipper and collect express fee invoice for reimbursement.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Original invoice and deduction sheet must be sent to Local Employer's Dalian Branch: Name: Sylvia Jiang, Office Address: 大连市高新园区高新街9号晟辉科技大厦703室, Tel.: +86 17615158127 or 0411-81760355 dial 808. Use S.F. Express paid by shipper and collect express fee invoice for reimbursement

issues.description: Meal expenses are not tax exempt and will be grossed up
issues.recommendation: Personal Meal during Business Trips generally not exceeding 150 RMB/day/person is tax exempt. Set rates: 1st tier cities (Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, Shenzhen) 200 yuan per day (80 yuan per meal lunch/dinner), new 1st tier and 2nd tier cities 150 yuan per day (60 yuan per meal), 3rd tier cities 100 yuan per day (40 yuan per meal). Meals exceeding limit treated as entertaining customers or reimbursed after withholding personal income tax
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Personal Meal during Business Trips generally not exceeding 150 RMB/day/person is tax exempt. Set rates: 1st tier cities (Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, Shenzhen) 200 yuan per day (80 yuan per meal lunch/dinner), new 1st tier and 2nd tier cities 150 yuan per day (60 yuan per meal), 3rd tier cities 100 yuan per day (40 yuan per meal). Meals exceeding limit treated as entertaining customers or reimbursed after withholding personal income tax

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt has multiple compliance violations including missing supplier address, VAT number, date of issue, tax amount, and item description. Additionally, the meal expense exceeds the tax-exempt limit and will be grossed up. Further documentation is required for proper reimbursement.
